properties.description: Dataflow to convert special characters CSV file data into Dynamic JSONCSV

typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	p_df_tgt_filename as string
}
source(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	multiLineRow: true) ~> SrcFile
surrogateKey unpivot(output(
		CKey as string,
		RValue as string
	),
	ungroupBy(SurKey),
	lateral: false,
	ignoreNullPivots: true) ~> UnpivotData
SrcFile keyGenerate(output(SurKey as long),
	startAt: 1L,
	stepValue: 1L) ~> surrogateKey
UnpivotData aggregate(groupBy(SurKey),
	JSON_ATTRIBUTE = collect(CKey+'::'+replace(replace(RValue,'\n',' '),'\r',' '))) ~> aggregate
aggregate derive(JSON_ATTRIBUTE = '{ '+trim(replace(toString(JSON_ATTRIBUTE),'::','" : "'),'[]')+' }') ~> JSONFormat
JSONFormat sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	partitionFileNames:[($p_df_tgt_filename+'.csv')],
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		JSON_Attribute = JSON_ATTRIBUTE
	),
	partitionBy('hash', 1)) ~> SnkJSON
